%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22ellipse%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3Baspect%3Dfixed%3B%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bdiv%26gt%3B%26lt%3Bspan%20style%3D%26quot%3Bbackground-color%3A%20transparent%3B%20color%3A%20light-dark(rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)%2C%20rgb(255%2C%20255%2C%20255))%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3BEMPTY%20SRTING%26lt%3B%2Fspan%26gt%3B%26lt%3B%2Fdiv%26gt%3B%26lt%3Bdiv%26gt%3B%26lt%3Bspan%20style%3D%26quot%3Bbackground-color%3A%20transparent%3B%20color%3A%20light-dark(rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)%2C%20rgb(255%2C%20255%2C%20255))%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3BSTATE%26lt%3B%2Fspan%26gt%3B%26lt%3B%2Fdiv%26gt%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2280%22%20width%3D%2280%22%20x%3D%22-120%22%20y%3D%22520%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3ESTATE

STATE%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22ellipse%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3Baspect%3Dfixed%3B%22%20value%3D%22%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2280%22%20width%3D%2280%22%20x%3D%22280%22%20y%3D%222054%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%223%22%20edge%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20source%3D%222%22%20style%3D%22endArrow%3Dnone%3Bhtml%3D1%3Brounded%3D0%3BexitX%3D0.107%3BexitY%3D0.809%3BexitDx%3D0%3BexitDy%3D0%3BfillColor%3D%23d80073%3BstrokeColor%3D%23A50040%3BexitPerimeter%3D0%3B%22%20value%3D%22%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2250%22%20relative%3D%221%22%20width%3D%2250%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22297%22%20y%3D%222557%22%20as%3D%22sourcePoint%22%2F%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22150%22%20y%3D%222119%22%20as%3D%22targetPoint%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxGeometry%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%224%22%20edge%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22endArrow%3Dclassic%3Bhtml%3D1%3Brounded%3D0%3BentryX%3D0%3BentryY%3D0.5%3BentryDx%3D0%3BentryDy%3D0%3B%22%20target%3D%225%22%20value%3D%22%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2250%22%20relative%3D%221%22%20width%3D%2250%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22180%22%20y%3D%222094%22%20as%3D%22sourcePoint%22%2F%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22285%22%20y%3D%222534%22%20as%3D%22targetPoint%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxGeometry%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%225%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22ellipse%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3Baspect%3Dfixed%3B%22%20value%3D%22COLON%20STATE%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2270%22%20width%3D%2270%22%20x%3D%22285%22%20y%3D%222059%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%226%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22text%3Bhtml%3D1%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dcenter%3BverticalAlign%3Dmiddle%3Brounded%3D0%3BfontSize%3D20%3BfontStyle%3D1%22%20value%3D%22%3A%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2230%22%20width%3D%2260%22%20x%3D%22190%22%20y%3D%222059%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%227%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22text%3Bhtml%3D1%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dcenter%3BverticalAlign%3Dmiddle%3Brounded%3D0%3B%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bdiv%26gt%3Breset%26lt%3B%2Fdiv%26gt%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2230%22%20width%3D%2260%22%20x%3D%22205%22%20y%3D%222114%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%228%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22ellipse%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3Baspect%3Dfixed%3B%22%20value%3D%22%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2280%22%20width%3D%2280%22%20x%3D%22390%22%20y%3D%221974%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%229%22%20edge%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20source%3D%225%22%20style%3D%22endArrow%3Dclassic%3Bhtml%3D1%3Brounded%3D0%3BentryX%3D0.5%3BentryY%3D1%3BentryDx%3D0%3BentryDy%3D0%3BexitX%3D1%3BexitY%3D0.5%3BexitDx%3D0%3BexitDy%3D0%3B%22%20target%3D%2213%22%20value%3D%22%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2250%22%20relative%3D%221%22%20width%3D%2250%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22280%22%20y%3D%222120%22%20as%3D%22sourcePoint%22%2F%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22385%22%20y%3D%222120%22%20as%3D%22targetPoint%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxGeometry%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%2210%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22text%3Bhtml%3D1%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dcenter%3BverticalAlign%3Dmiddle%3Brounded%3D0%3BfontSize%3D20%3BfontStyle%3D1%22%20value%3D%22%3D%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2230%22%20width%3D%2260%22%20x%3D%22379.5%22%20y%3D%222070%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%2211%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22text%3Bhtml%3D1%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3BstrokeColor%3Dnone%3BfillColor%3Dnone%3Balign%3Dcenter%3BverticalAlign%3Dmiddle%3Brounded%3D0%3B%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bdiv%26gt%3Breset%26lt%3B%2Fdiv%26gt%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2230%22%20width%3D%2260%22%20x%3D%22335%22%20y%3D%221990%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%2212%22%20edge%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20source%3D%228%22%20style%3D%22endArrow%3Dnone%3Bhtml%3D1%3Brounded%3D0%3BexitX%3D0.007%3BexitY%3D0.571%3BexitDx%3D0%3BexitDy%3D0%3BfillColor%3D%23d80073%3BstrokeColor%3D%23A50040%3BexitPerimeter%3D0%3B%22%20value%3D%22%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2250%22%20relative%3D%221%22%20width%3D%2250%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22389%22%20y%3D%222020%22%20as%3D%22sourcePoint%22%2F%3E%3CmxPoint%20x%3D%22150%22%20y%3D%222020%22%20as%3D%22targetPoint%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxGeometry%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%2213%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22ellipse%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3Baspect%3Dfixed%3B%22%20value%3D%22BECOMES%20STATE%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2270%22%20width%3D%2270%22%20x%3D%22395%22%20y%3D%221979%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E

any character except
a,A
(not include symbols)

any character except
m,M
(not include symbols)
COMMENT ASTERISK STATE

COMMENT
END STATE
Unmapped symbols in Symbols state e.g &,^,#,$,...
anak panah reset untuk berpindah ke start state
anak panah  untuk berpindah ke indent state
anak panah untuk berpindah ke unknown state
